raw_text: monastiri mohamed amine aeronautical engineering student l am a student in electromechanical engineering specializing in aeronautics, currently working on my final project as part of the erasmus program. have a passion for embedded systems and it, and am open to any internship or job opportunities. my strong technical curiosity and desire to learn motivate me to contribute to innovative projects in aerospace, automotive, or robotics. professional experience university of jaén february 2024 - july 2024 internship (end-of-studies) design a wireless sensor network (wsn) architecture based on esp32 tailored for runway monitoring. e analysis of functional and technical study. e creation of a sensor network architecture. e development of a server and two sensor nodes using esp32. e mechanical and electrical design. e prototype of the system. keywords : arduino ,c++ ,platformlo,mqtt blynk ,i2c, esp32,lora , uml, catia v5, fritzing tunisair express july 2023 technician internship + data management, technical reliability of atr 72-600 aircraft. e study and scheduling of the 2-year visit file for atr 72-600 aircraft. watts water technologies june 2022 summer internship e use of soldering technique for electronic component assembly. + troubleshooting electronic boards based on electrical schematics. e validation of defective boards by testing functionality. e participation in production meetings. tunisair technics march 2022 introductory professional experience internship monitoring of work across all departments of the mro company, including engine, structure, and avionics. e understanding and observation of the practical application of the amm (aircraft maintenance manual) and the cmm (component maintenance manual) on a damaged a320 aircraft. sabena technics august 2020 introductory professional experience internship + monitoring of fuel tank processing. e tracking of main landing gear spring replacement. + monitoring of composite material maintenance process for wing components. academic projects + design and development of a gps tracker that detects the real-time position of an object. - mechanical and electrical design of prototypes. - arduino programming. keywords : catia v5, fritzing , arduino ,c++ + simulation of a car collision keywords : abaqus + steady-state simulation of the naca4412 airfoil profile at various angles of attack keywords : ansys
